Contents

    About

    I design and ship software with a focus on clarity, performance, and usefulness. My background spans web engineering, content systems, and product design.

    Now

    • Building The Human Archives
    • Prototyping content pipelines from Markdown → web
    • Improving web performance and accessibility on real projects

    Skills

    • Frontend: TypeScript, React, Astro, Next.js
    • Architecture: content systems, static builds, GitHub Pages pipelines
    • UX: information architecture, typography, responsive systems
    • Ops: GitHub Actions, submodules, deployment workflows

    Principles

    • Clarity over cleverness
    • Evidence before claims (measure, then decide)
    • Ship in small slices; iterate visibly

    Selected work

    • The Human Archives — product, design system, content pipeline
    • Personal Website — Astro site with GitHub Pages + Obsidian sync
